title: podman can not list crio pods
body: podman can not list crio pods, crictl can list:

comments.body:
You cannot list pods but you should be able to list containers via `podman ps --storage`. `crictl` can list the pods as it's directly talking via the CRI interface to CRI-O.

Pods are a higher-level concept/abstraction that is not reflected in the storage backend.
